strengths: 15+ years of fullstack experience with direct alignment to the primary stack: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, Docker, and AWS CDK across multiple production roles
Current role at re:cinq explicitly covers AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, directly satisfying the AI agent development requirement
Consistent, demonstrated testing culture — TDD workshops, open-source testing libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), and applied craftsmanship practices across multiple employers
concerns: No Nest.js experience mentioned anywhere; the primary required framework is entirely absent from the resume
Kotlin is missing from the skillset; Java appears only in embedded/robotics context at Altom, not in backend service development
Named testing frameworks required by the role (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) are not cited in any role description despite strong general TDD credibility
response.justification: Bogdan is a strong match on the fundamentals: 15+ years of fullstack work, direct TypeScript/Node.js/React production experience, cloud and container fluency, and a current role that maps closely to the AI agent and developer-tooling focus of this position. The Nest.js gap is the most notable concern — it is the primary backend framework and is absent from the resume — but for a developer with this depth and breadth it represents a ramp-up rather than a disqualifier. Kotlin absence is a secondary concern given it is flagged as a secondary technology. Overall the profile fits the seniority and engineering quality bar well enough to warrant a technical screen.
